title: Aehr Test Systems Founder Sold Shares Worth $1.8 Million
text: Aehr Test Systems founder liquidated $1.8 million in shares following the company's strong stock performance and major customer order wins. The insider sale came after the company announced the $41 million hyperscaler contract, bringing the stock to all-time highs. The timing raised questions from some investors about executive confidence at elevated valuations. However, the company's substantial backlog and analyst upgrades suggest management's positive outlook remains intact. The stock trades at elevated multiples relative to historical levels, reflecting market enthusiasm for AI infrastructure plays.
